---
title: "Presentation"
author: "Tin Nguyen, Waranya Ratirotjanakul, Amisha Vatsa, Inayat Gill"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    controls: true
    theme: simple
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
    code-line-numbers: false
    highlight-style: github
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# load all required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| include: false

# load dataset
rent <- read_csv("dataset/australian_rental_market_2026.csv")

# clean the dataset
rent_clean <- rent |>

    # remove duplicates observations
    distinct() |>

    # retain variables relevant to analysis
    select(
        title,
        price_display,
        state,
        locality,
        propertyType,
        suburb,
        bedrooms,
        bathrooms,
        parking_spaces
    )
```

# Methodology
## Dataset Introduction

## Dataset Summary
